name: Маска Рога
notes: The Horn's Mask, the voice of the Defense of the First Adit on Kragmir's big arena. The bearer carries the great bronze horn that 'wakes the mine': his blasts time the show, call the reinforcement wave, and carry the founders' blessing. A warpriest-style support caster flavored as ancestral rites: he blesses and mends the Five, frightens raiders with the Roar, and is the single most valuable target on the platform. If the Horn falls silent, the wave arrives late and unblessed.

actions.name: Roar of the First Adit
actions.text:
Frequency once per fight.

The bearer sounds the great horn: the mountain answers, and the mine wakes. Each enemy in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] attempts a @Check[type:will|dc:25] save.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened] 1.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened] 2.

In the staged show this blast is also the signal that raises the lift plates (вручную: trigger the reinforcement wave).

description.value: The great bronze horn of the Defense of the First Adit, property of the Kragmir arena. Its voice times the show: the blessing, the Roar, and the waking of the mine. A stage relic, not a magic item; the arena wants it back after the bout.
